## Severity

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — data loss, security breach, or unauthorized action
- [ ] 🟠 High — wrong action taken, but reversible
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — suboptimal behavior, no damage
- [ ] 🟢 Low — cosmetic or minor annoyance
